summary: Full E2E testing of TerceroCard flow (Tests 1-8 from review request). All tests PASS. TerceroCard sequential flow works end-to-end: detect new tercero → show TerceroCard → edit → confirm → Alegra contact created → ExecutionCard appears → asiento confirmed → success. Cancel flow also works correctly.

issues: NIT field (tercero-nit) is empty even when user specifies NIT in message (900999888). The AI includes NIT in analysis text but doesn't populate the identification field in the crear_contacto payload. Minor UX issue - user must type NIT manually.

test_results.test_1_login: PASS - Login with contabilidad@roddos.com redirects to /agente-contable
test_results.test_2_tercero_card_detected: PASS - TerceroCard (data-testid='tercero-card') appears with orange header 'TERCERO NO ENCONTRADO EN ALEGRA'. Requires follow-up confirmation message after initial AI analysis.
test_results.test_3_form_fields: PASS - tercero-name='Tecnologías Nuevas SAS', tercero-nit field present (empty - see design issue), tercero-email present, cuenta contable sugerida (blue section) present with 5070, next action preview present
test_results.test_4_edit_form: PASS - Editing tercero-name activates confirm-tercero-btn (not disabled)
test_results.test_5_confirm_tercero: PASS - After click confirm-tercero-btn: success message 'Tercero Tecnologías Nuevas SAS creado exitosamente en Alegra — ID: 101' AND new ExecutionCard (data-testid='execution-card') appeared automatically
test_results.test_6_asiento_table: PASS - ExecutionCard shows ASIENTO CONTABLE with Cuenta/Débito/Crédito columns, 3 rows (5202 Otros honorarios $500k Débito, 5113 ReteFuente $55k Crédito, 5070 Proveedores $445k Crédito), TOTALES $500.000 = $500.000 (balanced)
test_results.test_7_confirm_causacion: PASS - confirm-execute-btn clicked, 'Ejecutado en Alegra exitosamente — ID: 28', Asiento contable created, Dashboard notificado, Log de auditoría actualizado
test_results.test_8_cancel_tercero: PASS - cancel-tercero-btn clicked, TerceroCard disappears, ExecutionCard not shown, message 'Acción cancelada. ¿En qué más te puedo ayudar?' displayed

action_items: MINOR: NIT field in TerceroCard is not pre-populated from AI payload (identification field empty). Consider fixing AI prompt/backend to extract and pass NIT in crear_contacto payload's identification field.
NOTE: AI requires a follow-up message ('Sí, crea el tercero y continúa') before showing TerceroCard - AI first shows analysis then waits. This is expected UX behavior but worth noting.
critical_code_review_comments: TerceroCard React Hook fix (from iteration_13) confirmed working correctly
Sequential flow (crear_contacto → next_pending_action → ExecutionCard) works end-to-end
Alegra contact creation is REAL (not mocked) - cleanup performed after test (DELETE /api/v1/contacts/101)
seed_data_creation: Created Alegra contact ID:101 (Tecnologías Nuevas SAS) and journal entry ID:28 during testing. Contact deleted via Alegra API cleanup. Journal entry ID:28 remains in Alegra.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TerceroCard E2E tests pass (iteration 14). Minor issue: NIT not pre-populated in TerceroCard from AI payload. All previous test results (debit/credit table, bill items, document badge) also pass. App is fully functional.
